use_cases: Music artist portfolio to showcase albums and projects with interactive hover effects
Creative portfolio landing page with live time display and scramble text animations
Personal artist showcase for musicians to present their discography
ai_summary: A music portfolio component featuring GSAP-powered scramble text animations on hover for project items. Includes a live corner clock display and project cards showing artist, album, category, label, and year information. Dark aesthetic with techy hacker-style text effects ideal for music artists and creative portfolios.
